name: L2 — Worldroot Sentinel Thorns
flavor: Bring an axe. We brought bark.
description: Mono-NATURE / mono-BULWARK bunker centered on worldroot_sentinel. The L2 mutation grants every ally on the team an effective +2 thorns_value (charter §22.2 L2), so every incoming attack pays back 2 real damage to the attacker — no triggers required, no SILENCE bypass needed. Bulwark_patriarch and the four NATURE supports (mossbear, thornserpent, root_warden, bramble_warden) layer on extra defense, taunts, and shield-on-damage so the team eats hits long enough for thorns to grind the opposing damage dealers off the board.
